name: Carrion Crawler Mucus
description: A creature subjected to Carrion Crawler Mucus must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or have the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. The creature also has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} in this way. The creature repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
